response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and geospatial experience, particularly with GISCollective and open-source projects, but lacks direct commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing/tiling pipelines. His background in distributed systems and performance optimization is relevant, though his recent roles emphasize TypeScript/Node.js and AI tooling over the core technical requirements.
strengths: Extensive geospatial experience with GISCollective, including open-source contributions and FOSS4G talk on GIS apps.
Proven track record in distributed systems and performance optimization (e.g., low-latency apps at Sociomantic, real-time data handling).
Strong problem-solving mindset with workshops on functional programming, testing, and system design.
concerns: Primary expertise in TypeScript/Node.js and Dlang, with no explicit commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing/tiling contexts.
Recent roles (re:cinq, Optilyz) focus on full-stack/AI tooling, diverging from the job’s core technical stack (C++/Linux/geospatial pipelines).
Lack of direct experience with navigation systems or routing data pipelines in production environments.
